title: Heininger 4016 HitchMate Cargo Stabilizer Bar for Full-Size Trucks

aspects.Features: Fits full size pickup trucks (expandable from 59"
aspects.California Prop 65 Warning: WARNING: This product can expose you to chemicals including bisphenol_a_(bpa), which is known to the State of California to cause cancer, birth defects or other reproductive harm. For more information, go to: www.P65Warnings.ca.gov
